name: codegraph_memory_store
description: Persists knowledge for future sessions. USE WHEN: discovering important context worth remembering — debugging insights, architectural decisions, known issues, coding conventions, or project-specific knowledge. Returns the stored memory ID. Each kind has specific optional fields: debug_context uses problem+solution, architectural_decision uses decision+rationale, known_issue uses description+severity. Tags improve future retrieval.

agentSource.description: Optional tag for which AI agent stored this memory (e.g. "claude", "cursor", "windsurf", "codex", "cline"). Surfaces in codegraph_memory_list output for cross-agent attribution.

problem.description: For debug_context: describe the problem encountered

rationale.description: For architectural_decision: reasoning behind the decision

solution.description: For debug_context: describe the solution found

title.description: Short descriptive title for the memory
